title: Ditherloom Suite Home Assistant Add On

user.title: Set up Ditherloom
user.description: Configure Ditherloom Home Assistant content. Home Assistant reads explicit HA-owned slots and content update cadence from the Ditherloom app/frame setup. Configure the reserved HA slot set in Ditherloom Suite over Wi-Fi, save it to the frame, then use these provider options. Weather data: Open-Meteo (https://open-meteo.com/), CC BY 4.0. Place lookup: OpenStreetMap/Nominatim (https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright), ODbL. Optional xkcd comics are by Randall Munroe and licensed CC BY-NC 2.5 (https://xkcd.com/license.html). {ha_lane_error}

weather.title: Weather
weather.description: Weather contains separate card providers. Each enabled weather card needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup.

sun.title: Sunrise / Sunset
sun.description: Each enabled Home Assistant content provider needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup.

moon.title: Moon Phase
moon.description: Each enabled Home Assistant content provider needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup.

comics_framework.title: Comics
comics_framework.description: Comics enabled contains the shared framework settings. Each comic source, including xkcd Comic and future comic providers, has its own page in this Comics section.

comics_settings.title: Comics enabled
comics_settings.description: Comics is the shared framework for comic sources. Current source registry: {comics_sources}. {comics_status} Every comic source must pass through the intelligent selector and Ditherloom 400x300 render contract before it can be cached for delivery. Comic-provider settings, including xkcd Comic, live on their own pages in this Comics section while still using their proven provider paths.

data_description.comics_enabled: Enables the shared Comics framework. xkcd Comic remains on the proven xkcd_comic provider, cache, render, and delivery path.
data_description.comics_slot_mode: Alternate mode uses one HA slot for the Comics family. Per-comic mode will require one explicit Ditherloom HA slot for each enabled comic source.

comics.title: Comics
comics.description: Comics enabled contains the shared framework settings. Each comic source, including xkcd Comic and future comic providers, has its own page in this Comics section.

comics_xkcd.title: xkcd Comic
comics_xkcd.description: xkcd Comic is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. Comics are by Randall Munroe and licensed CC BY-NC 2.5 (https://xkcd.com/license.html). Ditherloom filters out comics that are too busy, too tall, have more than three panels, or use colours the display cannot reproduce clearly. Sample rendered for Ditherloom: {xkcd_sample_image}

data_description.xkcd_enabled: When enabled, xkcd joins the HA-owned content rotation and consumes one explicit HA slot.
data_description.xkcd_attribution_notice: xkcd comics are by Randall Munroe and licensed CC BY-NC 2.5. Ditherloom displays this attribution on rendered xkcd cards and stores it in metadata.
data_description.xkcd_mode: Random searches for a suitable landscape comic. Latest uses the newest comic only if it passes the display filter. Fixed always tries the comic number below.
data_description.xkcd_number: Only used when Comic selection is Fixed comic number. Unsuitable comics fail closed instead of rendering unreadable content.
data_description.xkcd_random_attempts: Maximum random comics to test before failing closed. Higher values improve selection quality but may take longer.

comics_diesel_sweeties.title: Diesel Sweeties
comics_diesel_sweeties.description: Diesel Sweeties is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. Comics are by R. Stevens and licensed CC BY-NC 2.5 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/2.5/). Ditherloom filters candidates through the shared Comics intelligent selector and 400x300 hybrid renderer before caching them for delivery. Sample rendered for Ditherloom: {diesel_sweeties_sample_image}

data_description.diesel_sweeties_enabled: When enabled, Diesel Sweeties joins the HA-owned content rotation and consumes one explicit HA slot. Rendered cards include red Diesel Sweeties / R. Stevens | CC BY-NC attribution and store full license metadata.

comics_mimi_eunice.title: Mimi & Eunice
comics_mimi_eunice.description: Mimi & Eunice is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. Cartoons are by Nina Paley and licensed CC BY-SA (https://mimiandeunice.com/about/). Ditherloom filters candidates through the shared Comics intelligent selector and 400x300 hybrid renderer before caching them for delivery. Sample rendered for Ditherloom: {mimi_eunice_sample_image}

data_description.mimi_eunice_enabled: When enabled, Mimi & Eunice joins the HA-owned content rotation and consumes one explicit HA slot. Rendered cards include red Mimi & Eunice / Nina Paley | CC BY-SA attribution and store full license metadata.

astrology.title: Daily Astrology
astrology.description: Daily Astrology is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. It uses bundled Ditherloom sign artwork and Ditherloom-generated horoscope text informed by Skyfield/JPL planetary and lunar positions when available. Skyfield and jplephem are MIT licensed; JPL/NASA ephemeris data remains NASA/JPL work and is not claimed by Ditherloom. No external horoscope service, account, or scraped text is used. Select one or more star signs to rotate through this provider.

data_description.astrology_enabled: When enabled, Daily Astrology joins the HA-owned content rotation and consumes one explicit HA slot.
data_description.astrology_signs: Choose one or more signs. When multiple signs are selected, Ditherloom rotates the selected sign each refresh interval.

astronomy.title: Astronomy
astronomy.description: Astronomy contains separate night-sky cards. Each enabled Astronomy card needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup. Cards use bundled Ditherloom artwork and Ditherloom-generated text informed by Skyfield/JPL positions when available. Astronomy View Conditions uses Open-Meteo cloud/visibility data. Solar Activity and Aurora Watch use NOAA/SWPC data. Skyfield and jplephem are MIT licensed; JPL/NASA ephemeris data remains NASA/JPL work; NOAA/SWPC data remains NOAA work and is public domain unless noted; Open-Meteo is CC BY 4.0.

astronomy_visible_planets.title: Visible Planets
astronomy_visible_planets.description: Visible Planets is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. It uses bundled Ditherloom artwork and local sky calculations from Skyfield/JPL data when available. Rendered cards visibly attribute Ditherloom, Skyfield/JPL, and keep background artwork on the image path rather than snapping supplied artwork colours.

astronomy_moon_watch.title: Moon Watch
astronomy_moon_watch.description: Moon Watch is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. It uses bundled Ditherloom artwork and local moon calculations from Skyfield/JPL data when available. Rendered cards visibly attribute Ditherloom, Skyfield/JPL, and keep background artwork on the image path rather than snapping supplied artwork colours.

astronomy_constellation.title: Constellation Tonight
astronomy_constellation.description: Constellation Tonight is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. It uses bundled Ditherloom artwork, seasonal Ditherloom constellation rules, local latitude/longitude orientation, and Skyfield/JPL date context when available. Constellation lines are panel-safe white and stars are panel-yellow luxe star glyphs.

astronomy_tonight_sky.title: Tonight's Sky
astronomy_tonight_sky.description: Tonight's Sky is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. It summarises the moon phase and bright planets using bundled Ditherloom artwork and Skyfield/JPL data when available, with visible Skyfield/JPL attribution on the rendered card.

astronomy_overhead.title: Planets Overhead
astronomy_overhead.description: Planets Overhead is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. It picks the highest bright planet or moon from local Skyfield/JPL calculations when available and renders it on bundled Ditherloom artwork.

astronomy_conditions.title: Astronomy View Conditions
astronomy_conditions.description: Astronomy View Conditions is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. It uses Open-Meteo cloud cover and visibility data for the configured locale to say whether the sky is likely clear enough for viewing. Rendered cards visibly attribute Open-Meteo and Ditherloom.

astronomy_solar_activity.title: Solar Activity
astronomy_solar_activity.description: Solar Activity is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. It uses NOAA/SWPC Kp and solar-wind data to summarise current space-weather activity. Rendered cards visibly attribute NOAA/SWPC and Ditherloom.

astronomy_aurora_watch.title: Aurora Watch
astronomy_aurora_watch.description: Aurora Watch is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. It uses NOAA/SWPC aurora and Kp data with the configured locale to estimate likely viewing direction and naked-eye visibility. Rendered cards visibly attribute NOAA/SWPC and Ditherloom.

xkcd.title: xkcd Comic
xkcd.description: xkcd Comic is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. Comics are by Randall Munroe and licensed CC BY-NC 2.5 (https://xkcd.com/license.html). Ditherloom filters out comics that are too busy, too tall, have more than three panels, or use colours the display cannot reproduce clearly. Sample rendered for Ditherloom: {xkcd_sample_image}

data_description.xkcd_attribution_notice: xkcd comics are by Randall Munroe and licensed CC BY-NC 2.5. Ditherloom displays this attribution on rendered xkcd cards and stores it in metadata.
data_description.xkcd_mode: Random searches for a suitable landscape comic. Latest uses the newest comic only if it passes the display filter. Fixed always tries the comic number below.
data_description.xkcd_number: Only used when Comic selection is Fixed comic number. Unsuitable comics fail closed instead of rendering unreadable content.
data_description.xkcd_random_attempts: Maximum random comics to test before failing closed. Higher values improve selection quality but may take longer.

xkcd_comic.description: xkcd Comic is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. Comics are by Randall Munroe and licensed CC BY-NC 2.5 (https://xkcd.com/license.html). Ditherloom filters out comics that are too busy, too tall, have more than three panels, or use colours the display cannot reproduce clearly. Sample rendered for Ditherloom: {xkcd_sample_image}

data_description.xkcd_enabled: When enabled, xkcd joins the HA-owned content rotation and consumes one explicit HA slot.
data_description.xkcd_attribution_notice: xkcd comics are by Randall Munroe and licensed CC BY-NC 2.5. Ditherloom displays this attribution on rendered xkcd cards and stores it in metadata.
data_description.xkcd_mode: Random searches for a suitable landscape comic. Latest uses the newest comic only if it passes the display filter. Fixed always tries the comic number below.

device.title: Device / Connection
device.description: Frame host and Gateway settings are configured here. HA slots, content update cadence, wake safety, and HA-only rotation are owned by Ditherloom Suite and the frame firmware. To change slots or timing, connect to Ditherloom Suite over Wi-Fi, save the Home Assistant settings to the frame, then sync Home Assistant again. {ha_lane_error}

weather_current.title: Current Weather
weather_current.description: Each enabled Weather card needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup. Weather data: Open-Meteo (https://open-meteo.com/), CC BY 4.0. Place lookup: OpenStreetMap/Nominatim (https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright), ODbL.

weather_today_tomorrow.title: Today / Tomorrow
weather_today_tomorrow.description: Each enabled Weather card needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup. Weather data: Open-Meteo (https://open-meteo.com/), CC BY 4.0. Place lookup: OpenStreetMap/Nominatim (https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright), ODbL. This card uses today and tomorrow condition artwork split by a panel-yellow diagonal rule.

weather_7_day.title: 7-Day Forecast
weather_7_day.description: Each enabled Weather card needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup. Weather data: Open-Meteo (https://open-meteo.com/), CC BY 4.0. Place lookup: OpenStreetMap/Nominatim (https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright), ODbL. This card shows seven forecast rows: date, temperature range, and condition.

weather_radar.title: Weather Radar
weather_radar.description: Get your OpenWeather API key here: https://home.openweathermap.org/api_keys. Weather Radar is optional and needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup when enabled. Create a free or paid OpenWeather account, generate an API key under your own account, paste that key here, and follow OpenWeather's current API terms. The card fetches OpenWeather weather overlay tiles around the configured latitude/longitude, places them over a cached OpenStreetMap basemap, applies the selected Ditherloom-safe radar palette only to the weather overlay, shows the colour scale below the radar image, and records OpenWeather plus OpenStreetMap attribution in metadata. OpenWeather keys may take time to activate after creation. Palette samples rendered for Ditherloom: {radar_palette_sample_image}

weather_precipitation.title: Precipitation
weather_precipitation.description: Each enabled Weather card needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup. Weather data: Open-Meteo (https://open-meteo.com/), CC BY 4.0. This card groups the day into time blocks and graphs precipitation and rain probability over the day.

weather_uv.title: UV
weather_uv.description: Each enabled Weather card needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup. Weather data: Open-Meteo (https://open-meteo.com/), CC BY 4.0. This card groups the day into time blocks and graphs the UV index.

weather_wind.title: Wind
weather_wind.description: Each enabled Weather card needs one explicit HA slot from the Ditherloom app/frame setup. Weather data: Open-Meteo (https://open-meteo.com/), CC BY 4.0. This card groups the day into time blocks and graphs wind speed plus gusts.

error.not_enough_ha_slots: Not enough explicit HA slots are configured.
error.frame_ha_slots_not_synced: Home Assistant has not received the frame HA slot setup yet.
error.ha_lane_invalid: Home Assistant slot lane configuration is invalid.
error.xkcd_number_required: Choose a comic number when xkcd selection is fixed.
error.xkcd_number_invalid: Enter a whole comic number greater than zero, or leave this blank unless Comic selection is fixed.
